titleStmt.title: SII 37.174: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 174. (A.R. No. B 53 of 1939-40.) Rāchāyapēṭa, (Hamlet of Chintarājupalle), Siddhavatam Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up on the tank bund.
This is dated Śaka 1710, Saumya, Māgha ba. 5, Friday, corresponding to 1789 A.D., February 14, Saturday.

It records the construction of a tank across the Tummalayēru at Rāchāyapalle by Appalreḍḍi-Gangireḍḍi, Peda-Pōlreḍḍi, Vengalareḍḍi and China Pōlreḍḍi, sons of Kaluvāyi Buchchi Rāmireḍḍi and Nārāyaṇamma. It also states that Ādūri, Pāpireḍḍi, the Reḍḍis and Sambaṭūri Rāmachandru and others and the Karaṇaṁs of the village obtained the permission of the government (divāṇamvāru), constructed the tank and established an agrahāra on the occasion of lunar eclipse in the year Ānanda, Māgha month, and settled in it Brāhmanas of the three sects granting them vṛittis of land. It also gives the details of the taxes levied on lands cultivated under the tank and the mānyas given to the bōyas, who constructed the tank and to the others who were entrusted with its up keep.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmā .
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1710 A
gunēṭi saumyanāma saṁvatsara māgha
ba 5 śukravāra hastānakṣatra vṛṣa
bhalagna śubhamuhū¨rttamaṁdu
kaluvāya buccirāmireḍḍi nā
rāyaṇaṁmmagāri kumāḷlu Appa
lreḍḍi gaṁgireḍḍi pedaprolreḍḍi veṁ
galreḍḍi cinapōlreḍḍigāru rāmāpu
raṁ samutulō caṁdrapalleku vutta
raṁ rācayapalleku paḍamara tuṁmmala
yēṭiki Aḍḍaṁ ceruvulō Āraṁbhaṁ ceyyavalena
ni prayatnaṁcēśi Appuḍu grāmaṁlō reḍḍi ka
raṇālu Adūripāpireḍḍi karaṇaṁ saṁbaṭū
rirāmaceṁdṛḍu peddayya tippayyagāri
ni Aḍgi divāṇaṁ vāricēta śalavutīsuku
ni dāyādulu sāmaṁttulu paṁḍeṁḍu Ā
yamerkagāṁḍlu saṁmmatiki ceruvu kaṭṭiṁcci pū[¨rna]
nirvāhaṁggā ceyiṁcci Āceruvu dakṣiṇa bhāgamaṁdu
Ānaṁdanāma saṁvvaccara māgha śu sōmōparāga gra
haṇa puṁṇyakālamaṁdu Agrahāraṁ kaṭṭiṁcci padi
vṛttulu ni¨rnayaṁ cēśi vēdamū¨rtulagu trimatā
la brāṁhmalakuṁnnū sahiraṇyōdaka dānadhārā
pūrvakaṁggā dhārāgrahitaṁ cēśi cervu nirvāha
kaṁ cēśinaṁdduku daśabaṁdhaṁ yi ceruvu nīḷlu pārē
polānaku khasupārāmāpuraṁni rudrapalle caṁḍra
palle buccanapalle rācayapalle yī pallellōvuṁnna
polānaku kottapolānaku cātu¨rbhāgaṁ pātapo
lānaku dvādaśabhāgaṁ yī prakāraṁ divāṇaṁ vā
ru saṁmmatiṁcci saṁnnatu vrāśi yicri ganuka Aṁ
dduku grāmaṁlō sāmaṁtti dāyādulu karaṇā
lu reḍlu saṁmmati vagairālu saṁmmatiṁcci sthaḷaṁ ni¨rdē
śaṁcēśi vrāśi yicciri ganuka putrapautrapāraṁpa
ryaṁttaraṁ Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānu Anubhaviṁcca
galavāraṁ yī ceruvuku peddapolreḍḍi Agrahārāni
ki muhūttaṁ peṭṭinadi saṁccaṭūri peddayya yīce
ruvu kaṭṭina peddabōyulu vuppunārapa Abālaya
Aguruvappa Āhanumaṁttudēvaḷla veṁkkalu vēmulaveṁ
ṁkalu taṁmmiśeṭṭi cinapāpaya kaṁbāla dāsari dēvaḷla
dāsari yī vuḍḍebōyulaku gaḍḍayettumānyaṁ
polaṁ padikuṁṭṭalu yī ceruvu gaḍḍayettu tā
gāyiti gilaka dāsari koḍuku mokkaṭa dāsari
yī ceruvu tayinā tinavuṁḍḍe ganuka vīṇiki
nīru kaṭṭutanaṁ kharāru cēśi kuṁcceḍu mānyaṁ
koduva polānaku nīḷlu pāre pariyaṁttaraṁ kuṁṭṭa va 1 ki
giṁjalu ma 1 vureva 1 yidha¨rmma ceruvukiṁddākōru
guttalu mānyālu sahagānu polānaku piḍikarra dā
naṁ naḍipiṁccedi yippuḍu yi vrāśina prakāraṁ dha¨rmā
naku teluguvāru vyāghātaṁ cēśinaṭṭu Ayi kāśilō
gōvunu caṁppina pāpānapōduru turakaluvyāghā
taṁ cēśinaṭṭu Ayitē makkālō paṁddini caṁppina pāpā
napōduru
Digital edition of SII 37.174 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
